title: Amtech Drain Plunger Red / Black
features: POWERFUL ACTION: Clears common toilet, bath, sink and shower blockages — including hair build-up — without harsh chemicals.
VERSATILE DESIGN: Two interchangeable heads – 65mm for basins and showers, 160mm for toilets – for flexible use.
FAST SETUP: Forms a strong seal for efficient unblocking, helping remove sink and waste pipe blockages with less effort.
REUSABLE SOLUTION: An eco-friendly, long-lasting alternative to disposable drain cleaners.
BUILT TO LAST: Ideal for bathroom, kitchen and trade use, delivering reliable drain clearing for regular maintenance.
description: From the manufacturer About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
